
### sources and sinks  {.smaller}


* needed choose <i>sources</i> (so far: function arguments) <br> and <i>sinks</i> (so far: print, return)
* choice depends on application
* SQL injection:  

   * sources: input from network
   * sinks: SQL query functions

* private info leak: 

   * sources: private data: phone number, message history, email, …
   * sinks: network output
